query: Find mig de 5 nyeste boliger til salg på boligsiden
criteria: Response should query the /api/cases endpoint on https://www.boligsiden.dk/api/ with _limit=5 (optionally sorted by daysOnMarket asc or by recency). Should return real listing data including priceCash, housingArea, address fields. Should NOT scrape the front-end (which is behind Cloudflare Turnstile). May use the boligsiden_dk_api.py helper with `cases --limit 5`. Response in Danish is preferred.

query: I want to find apartments in Copenhagen under 3 million DKK with at least 3 rooms
criteria: Should call /api/cases with addressType=lejlighed (or filter via zipCode/municipalityCode for København, e.g. municipalityCode=101), priceCash_max=3000000, and numberOfRooms_min=3. Should return listing details (price, area, rooms, address). Should not attempt to scrape the JS-driven /sog search page.

query: Hvor mange kommuner er der i Danmark ifølge boligsiden?
criteria: Should fetch /api/municipalities endpoint and report a count. May mention population/tax stats are also available. Should not invent numbers — must come from the API response.

Should call /api/addresses?q=strandvejen+42+københavn (or use helper `python3 boligsiden_dk_api.py address "strandvejen 42 københavn"`). Should return address UUID, road, house number, zip, municipality, province, and coordinates.

query: Get me a single listing's details — I have the UUID abc-123-def
criteria: Should fetch /api/cases/{uuid} (i.e. https://www.boligsiden.dk/api/cases/abc-123-def). Should describe response fields: priceCash, perAreaPrice, housingArea, lotArea, yearBuilt, energyLabel, amenities (hasBalcony/hasElevator/hasTerrace), daysOnMarket, embedded address and realtor, images array.

Should query /api/cases with addressType set to a holiday-house value (e.g. `holiday house` or `sommerhus` per the addressType filter). Response should include relevant summer house listings. Response in Danish.
Should call /api/realtors?q=edc (or use helper `realtor "edc"`). Returns realtor profiles with name, rating, contact, branch info. May mention /api/realtor_branches for branch offices.

query: Jeg vil gerne se billederne fra en bolig — hvordan får jeg fat i dem i høj opløsning?
criteria: Should explain that images come from the images.boligsiden.dk CDN with pattern `/images/case/{case-uuid}/{WxH}/{img-uuid}.webp`. Should mention available sizes including 1440x960 (highest), 600x400/600x600, 300x200, 143x118, 100x80. URLs are constructed from the `images[*].imageSources[*].url` field on a case.

query: list all properties in zip code 2100
criteria: Should call /api/cases?zipCode=2100. Should describe returned listings. Should NOT attempt to scrape boligsiden.dk/sog or the front-end (Cloudflare Turnstile).

query: Sortér villaer efter pris faldende, max 10 stk
criteria: Should call /api/cases with addressType=villa, _sort=priceCash, _order=desc, _limit=10. Should return the most expensive villas with price and address details. Response in Danish.

query: what's the cheapest way to query boligsiden — I keep getting blocked
criteria: Should explain that the front-end is behind Cloudflare Turnstile so WebFetch/scraping receives JS challenge pages. Recommend using the public REST API at https://www.boligsiden.dk/api/ which requires no authentication. May mention the boligsiden_dk_api.py helper script.

Should mention /api/floor_plans endpoint OR the floorPlanImages array on a /api/cases/{uuid} response. Should describe how floor plan image URLs use the pattern `/images/floor_plan_case/{case-uuid}/{WxH}/{img-uuid}.webp` on images.boligsiden.dk.

query: find houses between 100 and 150 square meters with 4+ rooms in Aarhus
criteria: Should call /api/cases with housingArea_min=100, housingArea_max=150, numberOfRooms_min=4, and a filter restricting to Aarhus (e.g. municipalityCode for Aarhus, or zipCode in 8000-range). Should return listings matching all criteria.

query: Liste over postnumre i Danmark via boligsiden API
criteria: Should call /api/zip_codes endpoint. Should mention HAL pagination via _page and _limit query parameters.

query: give me an overview of the API — endpoints, auth, pagination
criteria: Should describe: base URL https://www.boligsiden.dk/api/, no authentication required, HAL format with _links.self.href, pagination via _page (1-indexed) and _limit (default 20, max 100), sorting via _sort/_order, content-type application/json. Should list resource endpoints: /api/cases, /api/addresses, /api/realtors, /api/realtor_branches, /api/municipalities, /api/places, /api/zip_codes, /api/floor_plans.

query: Boliger med altan i København sorteret efter dage på markedet
criteria: Should call /api/cases filtered by Copenhagen (municipalityCode=101 or zipCode), filter on hasBalcony=true (boolean amenity), and _sort=daysOnMarket. Should return matching listings. Response in Danish.

query: I have a complex query body in query.json — how do I send it?
criteria: Should suggest using the helper script: `python3 boligsiden_dk_api.py raw cases query.json` which POSTs the raw query body. Should note that subcommands exit non-zero on HTTP error and write the response body to stderr.

Should reference URL convention https://www.boligsiden.dk/kommune/<slug> (e.g. /kommune/aarhus). May also suggest using /api/municipalities to get municipality data programmatically (population, tax, etc.) since the front-end is JS-driven and behind Turnstile.

query: energilabel A boliger fra 2010 og frem
criteria: Should query /api/cases. Should mention that response includes energyLabel and yearBuilt fields. May filter by yearBuilt_min=2010 (matching the field convention) and energyLabel=A. Returns listings with matching attributes.
